_comment: Step 10 query-time pipeline config (the plan's 'eval.yaml' equivalent; kept as JSON for consistency with the rest of config/).
_comment_aggregation: score = max over the top_k LLM pair scores: a phrase is SCIENCE_TALK if it strongly matches ANY science anchor.
_comment_score_threshold: UNTUNED placeholder; Step 11 tunes this on dev to maximize F1 under a hard-informal recall floor.
_comment_degraded: When the LLM endpoint is unavailable, classify() falls back to bi-encoder cosine and labels via this cosine threshold, with degraded=true.

smoke._comment: Capped dev eval for proof-of-correctness. n_pos/n_neg dev phrases each scored against top_k anchors.
